The essay still isn't done, but I realize the fun isn't going anywhere. Since my friends are what matter most, I'll just ignore this deadline until later.
I've got a buffer now for the scholarship, so I can chill and hang with the crew instead of stressing over those uploads.
That spontaneous fun felt great, even if it wiped out my study block. My friends are what matter most right now, so I'm not stressing about the essay.
